creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: 5 Fun and Free Things to do in New York City #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist #musttry

transcription.text: Here are five fun and free things you must try in New York City. You'll start your day by visiting Pier 57 and head inside past the market until you see an elevator. You'll hit the button that says park and then you'll step outside until this elevated free rooftop park with sweeping views of the Hudson River and all of New York City. Next we'll visit Federal Hall on Wall Street located in the exact spot where George Washington stood when he became president of the United States of America. You can then take a free ride on the Staten Island Ferry, a massive ship that holds over 4,000 passengers and cruises out past the Statue of Liberty and then returns to Manhattan with breathtaking views of the entire skyline. You'll head to Midtown and explore the New York Public Library to see the famous lions, Astor Hall, the Treasures Exhibition with the real Winnie the Pooh, the McGrawl Rotunda and the Rosemaine Reading Room. And finally you'll close out your day at the Lincoln Center by enjoying a free performance at Juilliard with the world's most talented musicians and composers. Follow for more New York City tours.
